Meljeldin, Bane of Giants  
 

Lore Item No Trade Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 2H Slashing Atk Delay: 38
DMG: 45 Dmg Bonus: 136
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
STR: +10 STA: +10 AGI: +20
WT: 30.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: WAR PAL RNG SHD BER
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)
Meljeldin, Bane of Giants
Lore Item No Trade Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 2H Slashing Atk Delay: 38
DMG: 45 Dmg Bonus: 136
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
STR: +10 STA: +10 AGI: +20
WT: 30.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: WAR PAL RNG SHD BER
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Item Type:2H Slashing
Stackable:No
Submitted By:Maeldun MacLeod
Lucy Entry By:[AL]Horuss
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-12 08:19:22
Page Updated:Thu Oct 9th, 2008

Expansion: Scars of Velious
Rarity: Rare
Level to Attain: 55
[Drops | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Temple of Veeshan
NPC Name
Cekenar

Zone Name
Temple of Veeshan

# Oct 27 2002 at 12:47 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591775259709
4 posts
Got one of these last week. This sword is great, 38 delay cant go wrong. Although it lacks stats, Taunt = priceless. This sword deals out a huge amount of damage, i love it.
▲ Page top
yeah nice
QuoteReply
# Aug 23 2002 at 6:08 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592252285552
22 posts
Yeah ok I would love this 2hander but one question..Where is the Bane damage? ehh...
▲ Page top
What is in a Name?
QuoteReply
# Aug 19 2002 at 12:08 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591762483869
5 posts
Well, suggestion. How bout a damage bonus against giants? even +5 would be nice. Its in the name afterall. Not that Verant would care.

Edited, Mon Aug 19 00:58:23 2002
▲ Page top
Oh well.
QuoteReply
# Jun 11 2002 at 1:23 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591775376887
25 posts
I've been looking for some piece of anti-giant equipment. Giant Bane. hmm. Finally found it...But no. Gauntlets of Dragon Slaying, Belt of Dwarf Slaying, why nothing if you like to slay Giants? I slay giants for experience and entertainment, and ahve killed more than I would care to try to count, and I want something to display my enmity. For a bard like myself, this is no help. I'd take a 1AC breastplate if it said "of Giant Slaying" or "giant's bane" or "of people that don't like giants". Ah, no such luck though. So it goes.
▲ Page top

QuoteReply
# Dec 04 2001 at 1:48 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592756618184
View User Forum
8 posts
The weapon is now upgraded to 51 dam, 45 delay. If you're looking for a non-procing 2hs in your arsinal, this one is great.

RE: This weapon
QuoteReply
# Aug 02 2002 at 3:55 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592250836089
121 posts
Wouldn't it make sense?

Ah well... I got a Reaver (IDs as Bane of Dragons, I believe) and it doesn't even hit most dragons :P

Oh, and that spell only works on a few giants, not all. So Tormax? Would rock. The spell aggros like a level 1 (and eats 2 peridots per cast, but since it's a proc, no regeants) a frost giant scout? Nope. Kinda like the dragon bane spell, only works on a certain bloodline.

Besides, VI's skill in logic is (11) =P

Look at the slot it fits in, "primary" or "seconardy", my guess is this was created to be a 1hs because if it was 2hs it would just say "primary". I also would imagine this has be fixed by now and this picture just needs to be updated. BTW 25/34 1hs is very impressive.
Garrald Tarrant
55 evoker
Draegis Tavrose
54 champion
The Nameless
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: May 25 2001 at 4:45 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Hows about u bl0w me ok? Jerk0ff.....
Now that I think about it...
QuoteReply
# May 23 2001 at 1:15 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592247713415
16 posts
...this thing actually has the same damage per second as a Felhammer, 6.6 less weight, plus stamina, and it's faster, which means you will get much bigger damage bonuses...
like... say in a certain time period you hit 2 times with felhammer and 3 times with this.
fel- 69 + 15 or so, = 84 * 2 = 168
this- 51 + 15 = 66 * 3 = 198
so...this aint a half bad weapon :) while I have come to expect really nice procs from this zone and VP, this isn't a complete piece of ****... it's actually pretty good :)

Eldiemru Tel'Jallyn
25 wood elf warrior
-=Draconium=-
Zebuxoruk

Three possibilities
QuoteReply
# May 21 2001 at 7:53 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592247713415
16 posts
Ok...
A) this weapon is fake
B) Verant made the embarassing mistake of making a 2hs usable in primary and secondary hands
C) Verant made the embarassing mistake of labeling a 1hs weapon as 2hs.

now... I am assuming this is a typo, and not fake
If it is a 2hs, it is an absolute piece of ****- the dam/delay sucks for a weapon dropped off of so powerful a mob
If, on the other hand, it is in fact a 1hs... we have found the new wurmslayer! :)
what do you guys think it is?
